commands.review_summary:
The branch hardens macOS screen.snapshot by rejecting malformed params, sanitizing capture failures, enforcing projected 25 MiB node.invoke.result payload bounds, plumbing nodeId through bridge invoke requests, and adding Swift regression tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes, by source inspection: current main still treats malformed screen.snapshot params as defaults and emits inline base64 payloadJSON without a 25 MiB transport-size guard.
